# Phase 10.0.29 Memory Truth Plan

Phase: 10.0.29 - Constitutional Memory Integrity, Historical Truth Preservation & Anti-Rewrite Doctrine  
Status: Planning-only handoff note. Runtime remains disabled.

## Scope

Add governance-only doctrine for constitutional memory integrity, historical truth preservation, anti-rewrite governance, institutional history continuity, archive integrity extension, anti-propaganda governance, evidence-preserving reconciliation, historical context survivability, narrative legitimacy containment, institutional memory stewardship, anti-myth-fabrication, long-horizon truth continuity, and the phase summary.

## Repository State

Repository classification remains UNSTABLE because unrelated runtime/app drift, generated Prisma artifacts, many untracked paths, and branch-ahead divergence are present. This plan does not clean, revert, stage, commit, repair, rewrite, generate narratives, verify, arbitrate, or mutate those changes.

## Non-Runtime Constraint

This plan creates no runtime enablement, APIs, providers, adapters, credentials, OAuth, Prisma/Supabase changes, Twilio/email execution, background jobs, autonomous historical systems, automatic legitimacy rewriting, narrative-generation authority, propaganda systems, repository repair, staging, commits, branch repair, rollback execution, destructive git operations, deployment authority, or infrastructure activation.
